case_title: CHUN XIA WU VS. GARMENT NETWORK INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF WU, CHUN XIA AS TO DEFENDANT GARMENT NETWORK INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION AKA G.N.T. INC. AND TEAMSHOP JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WU, CHUN XIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARMENT NETWORK INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION AKA G.N.T. INC. AND TEAMSHOP $19,935.32 PRINCIPAL, $406.66 INTEREST, $300.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $20,642.48, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
